thinkprint.tagline: Thinkprint extracts how you actually think and decide — then lets you test it in fun projects.
thinkprint.description: Give it a conversation. Get back your decision-making style. Then see how it holds up under pressure, in dating, or against AI Elon.

status.label: Status
status.note: Hands-on experience first, heavy docs later.

items.toy: Finds your decision-making patterns from real conversations
items.reflection: Turns them into a visible, shareable thinking profile
items.declaration: Lets you test that profile in fun, hands-on projects

items.profiling: No medical diagnosis or clinical labels
items.alignment: Not a hidden AI control tool

pipeline.title: Flow
pipeline.description: A clear 5-step loop from input to scenario scoring.

extract.title: Your input
extract.description: Start with a real line from your own decision context.

calibrate.title: Extraction
calibrate.description: Extract decision signals and structure your Thinkprint.

deepen.title: Blind Think Date
deepen.description: Check fit and friction points in dialogue first.

compare.title: AI Elon Comparison
compare.description: Then compare your choice and AI Elon's choice side by side.

freeze.title: Hard scenario score
freeze.description: See where your style struggles through scenario scores.

demo.title: Three projects to try
demo.description: No reading required. Pick a project and see your thinking style in action.

blindDate.title: Fun Project #1 · Blind Think Date
blindDate.description: Run 1,000 virtual dates with other Thinkprints and find out who you're actually compatible with.

persona.title: Fun Project #2 · Mode Playground
persona.description: See how other Thinkprints — like AI Elon's — would handle your toughest decisions. Then train to think like them.

difficulty.title: Fun Project #3 · Hard Scenarios
difficulty.description: Throw your Thinkprint into 1,000 tough scenarios and find where you break down — before it happens for real.

interactiveDemo.title: Try it yourself
interactiveDemo.description: Pick a project. See what comes back.

blindDate.title: Blind Think Date
blindDate.input: Find other Thinkprints that click with how I think.
blindDate.output: 1,000 virtual dates complete. Top matches: a calm strategist, a playful realist, and a curious builder. Want to reach out to the real people behind them?

persona.title: Mode Playground
persona.input: Am I making the right call here? How would others decide? What would Elon's Thinkprint do?
persona.output: AI Elon would split the risk into small experiments and kill the losers fast. Want to train yourself to think like his Thinkprint?

difficulty.title: Hard Scenarios
difficulty.input: My Thinkprint looks solid. Throw it into tough scenarios so I can prep for weak spots.
difficulty.output: After 1,000 simulations: your Thinkprint tends to over-commit under time pressure, and avoids confrontation in emotional settings. Want to find ways to overcome that?

interactiveDemo.insight: Run all three. See your style from different angles.

output.title: Under the hood
output.description: The science, evidence standards, and safety rules behind Thinkprint.

model.title: Psychology foundation
model.description: Built on established decision-making research — how people actually choose under uncertainty.

evidence.title: Evidence standards
evidence.description: Every insight comes from your actual language, with built-in uncertainty awareness.

safety.title: Safety guardrails
safety.description: Not a diagnostic tool. You can opt out anytime. The system stops if it detects distress signals.

connection.title: Part of BufferLine
connection.description: Thinkprint captures your style. JDVP tracks how it changes over time. Together, they complete the picture.
connection.future: Start with fun projects, then connect to real decision improvement.

deck.title: See the Thinkprint deck
deck.description: What you can try, not how it works — in slides.
